files.example.gemspec:
# frozen_string_literal: true

Gem::Specification.new do |spec|
  spec.name = "example"
  spec.summary = "Example gem"
  spec.description = "Example gem for kettle-jem"
  spec.homepage = "https://example.test"
  spec.metadata["source_code_uri"] = "https://github.com/example/example"
  spec.metadata["funding_uri"] = "https://github.com/sponsors/example"
  spec.licenses = ["MIT"]
  spec.required_ruby_version = ">= 3.2"
end
files..kettle-jem.yml:
workflows:
  preset: framework
  framework_matrix:
    dimension: rails
    versions:
      - "7.0"
      - "7.1"
    gemfile_pattern: rails_{version}
files.gemfiles/modular/shunted.gemfile:
# frozen_string_literal: true

# local additions stay above
files.Rakefile:
# frozen_string_literal: true

require "bundler/gem_tasks"
require "rspec/core/rake_task"

RSpec::Core::RakeTask.new(:spec)

task default: :spec

# Keep custom task.
task :custom do
  puts "custom"
end

files..github/workflows/framework-ci.yml:
name: Rails CI

permissions:
  contents: read

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - "main"
      - "*-stable"
    tags:
      - "!*" # Do not execute on tags
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - "*"
  workflow_dispatch:

concurrency:
  group: "${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}"
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  test:
    if: "!contains(github.event.commits[0].message, '[ci skip]') && !contains(github.event.commits[0].message, '[skip ci]')"
    name: Specs ${{ matrix.ruby }}@${{ matrix.framework_version }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    continue-on-error: ${{ endsWith(matrix.ruby, 'head') }}
    env:
      BUNDLE_GEMFILE: ${{ github.workspace }}/${{ matrix.gemfile }}
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        ruby:
          - "3.2"
          - "3.3"
          - "3.4"
        rubygems:
          - default
        bundler:
          - default
        include:
          - framework_version: "7.0"
            gemfile: "gemfiles/rails_7_0"
          - framework_version: "7.1"
            gemfile: "gemfiles/rails_7_1"

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2

      - name: Setup Ruby & RubyGems
        uses: ruby/setup-ruby@e65c17d16e57e481586a6a5a0282698790062f92 # v1.300.0
        with:
          ruby-version: "${{ matrix.ruby }}"
          rubygems: "${{ matrix.rubygems }}"
          bundler: "${{ matrix.bundler }}"
          bundler-cache: true

      - name: Tests for ${{ matrix.ruby }}@${{ matrix.framework_version }}
        run: bundle exec rake test
files..github/workflows/ci.yml:
name: CI

permissions:
  contents: read

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - "main"
      - "*-stable"
    tags:
      - "!*" # Do not execute on tags
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - "*"
  workflow_dispatch:

concurrency:
  group: "${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}"
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  test:
    if: "!contains(github.event.commits[0].message, '[ci skip]') && !contains(github.event.commits[0].message, '[skip ci]')"
    name: Specs ${{ matrix.ruby }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    continue-on-error: ${{ endsWith(matrix.ruby, 'head') }}
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        ruby:
          - "3.2"
          - "3.3"
          - "3.4"
        rubygems:
          - default
        bundler:
          - default

    steps:
      - name: Checkout example
        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2

      - name: Setup Ruby & RubyGems
        uses: ruby/setup-ruby@e65c17d16e57e481586a6a5a0282698790062f92 # v1.300.0
        with:
          ruby-version: "${{ matrix.ruby }}"
          rubygems: "${{ matrix.rubygems }}"
          bundler: "${{ matrix.bundler }}"
          bundler-cache: true

      - name: Tests
        run: bundle exec rake
